lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪ ਹੀ ਧਾਰਨ ਧਾਰੇ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਹੈ ਦੇਖਾਰੇ ਬਰਨੁ ਚਿਹਨੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਮੁਖ ਨ ਮਸਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: aap hee dhaaran dhaare kudarat hai dekhaare baran chihan naahee mukh na masaare |
lines.english: He Himself supports the Universe, revealing His All-powerful Creative Potency. He has no color, form, mouth or beard.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਭਗਤੁ ਦਰਿ ਤੁਲਿ ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਸਮਸਰਿ ਏਕ ਜੀਹ ਕਿਆ ਬਖਾਨੈ ॥
lines.translit: jan naanak bhagat dar tul braham samasar ek jeeh kiaa bakhaanai |
lines.english: Your devotees are at Your Door, O God - they are just like You. How can servant Nanak describe them with only one tongue?

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਾਂ ਕਿ ਬਲਿ ਬਲਿ ਬਲਿ ਬਲਿ ਸਦ ਬਲਿਹਾਰਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: haan ki bal bal bal bal sad balihaar |3|
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, a sacrifice, a sacrifice, a sacrifice, forever a sacrifice to them. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਗੁਣ ਨਿਧਾਨੰ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਨ ਗੵਾਨੰ ਧੵਾਨੰ ਊਚੇ ਤੇ ਊਚੌ ਜਾਨੀਜੈ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤੇਰੋ ਥਾਨੰ ॥
lines.translit: sarab gun nidhaanan keemat na gayaanan dhayaanan aooche te aoochau jaaneejai prabh tero thaanan |
lines.english: You are the Treasure of all virtue; who can know the value of Your spiritual wisdom and meditation? O God, Your Place is known as the highest of the high.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਧਨੁ ਤੇਰੋ ਪ੍ਰਾਨੰ ਏਕੈ ਸੂਤਿ ਹੈ ਜਹਾਨੰ ਕਵਨ ਉਪਮਾ ਦੇਉ ਬਡੇ ਤੇ ਬਡਾਨੰ ॥
lines.translit: man dhan tero praanan ekai soot hai jahaanan kavan upamaa deo badde te baddaanan |
lines.english: Mind, wealth and the breath of life belong to You alone, Lord. The world is strung upon Your Thread. What praises can I give to You? You are the Greatest of the great.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਨੈ ਕਉਨੁ ਤੇਰੋ ਭੇਉ ਅਲਖ ਅਪਾਰ ਦੇਉ ਅਕਲ ਕਲਾ ਹੈ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਰਬ ਕੋ ਧਾਨੰ ॥
lines.translit: jaanai kaun tero bheo alakh apaar deo akal kalaa hai prabh sarab ko dhaanan |
lines.english: Who can know Your Mystery? O Unfathomable, Infinite, Divine Lord, Your Power is unstoppable. O God, You are the Support of all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਾਂ ਕਿ ਬਲਿ ਬਲਿ ਬਲਿ ਬਲਿ ਸਦ ਬਲਿਹਾਰਿ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: haan ki bal bal bal bal sad balihaar |4|
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, a sacrifice, a sacrifice, a sacrifice, forever a sacrifice to them. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਭਗਤੁ ਦਰਿ ਤੁਲਿ ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਸਮਸਰਿ ਏਕ ਜੀਹ ਕਿਆ ਬਖਾਨੈ ॥
lines.translit: jan naanak bhagat dar tul braham samasar ek jeeh kiaa bakhaanai |
lines.english: Your devotees are at Your Door, O God - they are just like You. How can servant Nanak describe them with only one tongue?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰੁ ਆਕਾਰ ਅਛਲ ਪੂਰਨ ਅਬਿਨਾਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: nirankaar aakaar achhal pooran abinaasee |
lines.english: O Formless, Formed, Undeceivable, Perfect, Imperishable,

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਖਵੰਤ ਆਨੰਤ ਰੂਪ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਬਿਗਾਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: harakhavant aanant roop niramal bigaasee |
lines.english: Blissful, Unlimited, Beautiful, Immaculate, Blossoming Lord:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਉ ਹੋਂਹਿ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲ ਸੁ ਜਨੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤੁਮਹਿ ਮਿਲਾਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kau honhi kripaal su jan prabh tumeh milaasee |
lines.english: That humble being upon whom You shower Your Mercy meets with You, O God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਹਿ ਬੇਅੰਤ ਅੰਤੁ ਇਕੁ ਤਿਲੁ ਨਹੀ ਪਾਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: gun gaaveh beant ant ik til nahee paasee |
lines.english: Countless are those who sing Your Glorious Praises, but they do not know even a tiny bit of Your extent.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਜਿਨ ਪਰਸਿਅਉ ਸਿ ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਦੁਹ ਥੇ ਰਹਿਓ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: har gur naanak jin parasiaau si janam maran duh the rahio |5|
lines.english: Whoever meets with the Lord through Guru Nanak is rid of both birth and death. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਨਿ ਧੰਨਿ ਤੇ ਧੰਨਿ ਜਨ ਜਿਹ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲੁ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਭਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: dhan dhan te dhan jan jih kripaal har har bhyau |
lines.english: Blessed, blessed, blessed are those humble beings, upon whom the Lord, Har, Har, showers His Mercy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿ ਸਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਸਤਿ ਸਤਿ ਸਤੇ ਸਤਿ ਭਣੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: sat sat har sat sat sate sat bhaneeai |
lines.english: The Lord is said to be True, True, True, True, the Truest of the True.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਸਰ ਆਨ ਨ ਅਵਰੁ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਪਊਰਾਤਨੁ ਸੁਣੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: doosar aan na avar purakh paooraatan suneeai |
lines.english: There is no other like Him. He is the Primal Being, the Primal Soul.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਹਰਿ ਕੋ ਨਾਮੁ ਲੈਤ ਮਨਿ ਸਭ ਸੁਖ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: amrit har ko naam lait man sabh sukh paae |
lines.english: Chanting the Ambrosial Name of the Lord, the mortal is blessed with all comforts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਹ ਰਸਨ ਚਾਖਿਓ ਤੇਹ ਜਨ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਿ ਅਘਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jeh rasan chaakhio teh jan tripat aghaae |
lines.english: Those who taste it with their tongues, those humble beings are satisfied and fulfilled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਜਿਨੑ ਪਰਸਿਓ ਤਿਨੑ ਸਭ ਕੁਲ ਕੀਓ ਉਧਾਰੁ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: har gur naanak jina parasio tina sabh kul keeo udhaar |6|
lines.english: Whoever meets with the Lord through Guru Nanak, saves all his generations. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਹ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਸੁਪ੍ਰਸੰਨੁ ਭਯੋੁ ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਤਿਹ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: jih tthaakur suprasan bhayo satasangat tih piaar |
lines.english: That person who becomes pleasing to his Lord and Master, loves the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਸਭਾ ਦੀਬਾਣੁ ਸਚੁ ਸਚੇ ਪਹਿ ਧਰਿਓ ॥
lines.translit: sach sabhaa deebaan sach sache peh dhario |
lines.english: True is His Congregation and His Court. The True Lord has established Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੈ ਤਖਤਿ ਨਿਵਾਸੁ ਸਚੁ ਤਪਾਵਸੁ ਕਰਿਓ ॥
lines.translit: sachai takhat nivaas sach tapaavas kario |
lines.english: Sitting upon His Throne of Truth, He administers True Justice.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਤਨ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਪਾਰੁ ਕੀਮ ਨਹੁ ਪਵੈ ਅਮੁਲਉ ॥
lines.translit: ratan naam apaar keem nahu pavai amulau |
lines.english: The Naam, the Name of the Infinite Lord, is the jewel. Its value cannot be appraised - it is priceless.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਿ ਸਿਰਜੵਿਉ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ਆਪਿ ਆਭੁਲੁ ਨ ਭੁਲਉ ॥
lines.translit: sach sirajayiau sansaar aap aabhul na bhulau |
lines.english: The True Lord Himself fashioned the Universe. He is Infallible, and does not make mistakes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਹ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲੁ ਹੋਯਉ ਗੋੁਬਿੰਦੁ ਸਰਬ ਸੁਖ ਤਿਨਹੂ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jih kripaal hoyau goubind sarab sukh tinahoo paae |
lines.english: That person, upon whom the Lord of the Universe showers His Mercy obtains all comforts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਜਿਨੑ ਪਰਸਿਓ ਤੇ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਜੋਨਿ ਨ ਆਏ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: har gur naanak jina parasio te bahurr fir jon na aae |7|
lines.english: Those who touch the Feet of the Lord through Guru Nanak, do not have to enter the cycle of reincarnation ever again. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਵਨੁ ਜੋਗੁ ਕਉਨੁ ਗੵਾਨੁ ਧੵਾਨੁ ਕਵਨ ਬਿਧਿ ਉਸ੍ਤਤਿ ਕਰੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: kavan jog kaun gayaan dhayaan kavan bidh ustat kareeai |
lines.english: What is the Yoga, what is the spiritual wisdom and meditation, and what is the way, to praise the Lord?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਧ ਸਾਧਿਕ ਤੇਤੀਸ ਕੋਰਿ ਤਿਰੁ ਕੀਮ ਨ ਪਰੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: sidh saadhik tetees kor tir keem na pareeai |
lines.english: The Siddhas and seekers and the three hundred thirty million gods cannot find even a tiny bit of the Lord's Value.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮਾਦਿਕ ਸਨਕਾਦਿ ਸੇਖ ਗੁਣ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: brahamaadik sanakaad sekh gun ant na paae |
lines.english: Neither Brahma, nor Sanak, nor the thousand-headed serpent king can find the limits of His Glorious Virtues.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਹ ਕਾਟੀ ਸਿਲਕ ਦਯਾਲ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਸੇਇ ਜਨ ਲਗੇ ਭਗਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: jih kaattee silak dayaal prabh see jan lage bhagate |
lines.english: Those whom God has mercifully freed from their nooses - those humble beings are attached to His devotional worship.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਹੁ ਗਹਿਓ ਨਹੀ ਜਾਇ ਪੂਰਿ ਸ੍ਰਬ ਰਹਿਓ ਸਮਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: agahu gahio nahee jaae poor srab rahio samaae |
lines.english: The Inapprehensible Lord cannot be apprehended. He is pervading and permeating amongst all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਦਾਤਉ ਦਾਤਾਰ ਪਰੵਿਉ ਜਾਚਕੁ ਇਕੁ ਸਰਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: prabh daatau daataar parayiau jaachak ik saranaa |
lines.english: I am a beggar; I seek the Sanctuary of God, the Giver of givers.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਜਿਨੑ ਪਰਸਿਓ ਤੇ ਇਤ ਉਤ ਸਦਾ ਮੁਕਤੇ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: har gur naanak jina parasio te it ut sadaa mukate |8|
lines.english: Those who meet with the Lord through Guru Nanak are liberated forever, here and hereafter. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਤਿ ਕਰਉ ਅਰਦਾਸਿ ਸੁਨਹੁ ਜੇ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਭਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: binat krau aradaas sunahu je tthaakur bhaavai |
lines.english: Please listen to my prayer, if it pleases You, O my Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲੈ ਦਾਨੁ ਸੰਤ ਰੇਨ ਜੇਹ ਲਗਿ ਭਉਜਲੁ ਤਰਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: milai daan sant ren jeh lag bhaujal taranaa |
lines.english: Please bless me with the gift of the dust of the feet of the Saints; grasping them, I cross over the terrifying world-ocean.
